field_guide.net_signal_rating: 1–10 composite: thesis_align(30%) + capital_impact(25%) + prob_follow(25%) + priority_norm(20%) ± risk/reaction adjustments
field_guide.capital_impact_score: 1–10: revenue/contract significance, dollar amounts, public company relevance
field_guide.probability_of_follow_through: 1–10: likelihood signal results in real market action
field_guide.thesis_alignment_score: 1–10: fit with Investing with SPACE core thesis layers
field_guide.execution_risk: low | medium | high — risk of acting on this signal

meta.scoring_note: Priority score = alert_score + confidence + tracked_company_status + revenue_event + core_layer_hits + feed_repetition + dollar_amount + freshness - false_positive_risk - staleness

priority_signals.headline: Lunar Outpost Closes $30M Series B, Unveils New Rover
priority_signals.summary: The fundraise highlights the huge demand from investors looking to capitalize on NASA’s new vision for the US presence on the Moon. The post Lunar Outpost Closes $30M Series B, Unveils New Rover appeared first on Payload .

priority_signals.headline: HawkEye 360 Raises $416M in IPO
priority_signals.summary: The VA-based company priced its 16M shares at $26 per share—at the top of the $24-$26 range shared in the company’s S-1 filing on May 1. The post HawkEye 360 Raises $416M in IPO appeared first on Payload .

priority_signals.headline: Rocket Lab To Acquire Motiv Space Systems
priority_signals.summary: Rocket Lab will acquire space robotics company Motiv Space Systems. The acquisition, announced Thursday evening in conjunction with Rocket Lab’s Q1 earnings, will achieve two goals: Motiv is expected to be rebranded as Rocket Lab Robotics when the acquisition closes, which is scheduled for Q2. Other
priority_signals.why_it_matters: M&A reshapes competitive landscape and supply chain dependencies | Directly involves tracked universe companies: Rocket Lab, SES, MP Materials
priority_signals.recommended_action: Assess impact on supply chain and competing positions

priority_signals.headline: Missile Defense Agency Plans Counter-Hypersonic Test in Fiscal 2027
priority_signals.summary: The Missile Defense Agency plans to test its ability to track and take down a hypersonic missile, staging a test flight in fiscal 2027 called “Project Maverick.” The post Missile Defense Agency Plans Counter-Hypersonic Test in Fiscal 2027 appeared first on Air & Space Forces Magazine .
